model_specification_line: results = smf.wls("full_time_employed ~ daca_eligible * post_2013_2016 + age_in_2012 + I(age_in_2012 ** 2) + C(year) + C(statefip) + C(sex) + C(educ_group) + UNEMP + LFPR + EVERIFY + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION", data=analysis_df, weights=analysis_df["perwt"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": analysis_df["statefip"]})
treatment_definition: int((((birthyr > 1981) or ((birthyr == 1981) and (birthqtr in (3, 4)))) and ((yrimmig - birthyr) < 16) and (yrimmig <= 2007) and ((school == 2) or (educd >= 62) or (vetstat == 2)) and (citizen in (3, 4, 5))))
